race.description: Mos Eisley Cantina After The Last BM56 Hcp
race.comment: SHORT REPLY (10) just missed two runs back at Kyneton then improved last time out to score by half a length as favourite over 1512m at Geelong. John Allen scored on her last time and retains the mount. Nicely placed to go on with the job. BRAZENGA (2) raced on speed and followed a 1L defeat at Geelong with a win there over 1315m. Carries more weight but peaks now and has each-way claims. Ditto FIRE WHEEL (6), who resumed in good order at Echuca, beaten 1.3L. Has likely had issues, but has ability and can go on with it this preparation. Has a handy gate and 3kg claim. THUNDER HAWK (7) resumed over 1425m at Werribee and found on better. Has more to give and has placed 2/3 second-up. She deserves consideration as well.
